title: Bit Digital Announces Upsized $135 Million Convertible Notes Offering
text: Bit Digital announced pricing of its upsized underwritten public offering of $135 million aggregate principal amount of 4.00% convertible senior notes due 2030, closing on October 2, 2025. The Notes will be senior, unsecured obligations accruing interest at 4.00% per year, payable semiannually, with maturity on October 1, 2030, unless earlier converted, redeemed or repurchased. The initial conversion rate will be 240.3846 shares per $1,000 principal amount, equivalent to an initial conversion price of $4.16 per ordinary share, representing a 30% conversion premium above the last reported sale price of $3.20 on September 29, 2025. Net proceeds of approximately $128.9 million will primarily be used to purchase Ethereum. Notable crypto-focused investors participated including Kraken Financial, Jump Trading Credit, and Jane Street Capital. The offering demonstrates strong institutional support for Bit Digital's strategic pivot toward Ethereum treasury accumulation.
